message:
Implement P4.2: GitHub Pages Deployment

Implemented GitHubDeployer for automated GitHub Pages deployment:
- Prerequisites checking: gh CLI version, auth status, git version, disk space
- Size validation: 1GB site limit, 100MiB per-file limit, warning at 50MiB
- Repository management: create new repos, check existing, force overwrite option
- Deployment flow: clone to temp dir, copy bundle, orphan branch, force push
- Pages API: enable GitHub Pages via gh api command
- Fluent builder API: repo name, description, public/private, force options

All 5 unit tests pass covering:
- Prerequisites ready/not ready detection
- Builder pattern configuration
- Size checking with file scanning
- Recursive directory copying

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
